---
title: "Bio Tooltips report"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(biotooltips)
```

```{r bio-tooltips-setup, echo=FALSE}
use_bio_tooltips(modules = c("gene", "chemical"))
```

The gene `r gene_tt("TP53", species = "human")` can be used inline in prose.

```{r results='asis'}
top_genes <- data.frame(
  symbol = c("TP53", "BRCA1", "GADD45A"),
  log2FoldChange = c(2.1, -1.4, 1.2),
  padj = c(0.0004, 0.002, 0.01)
)

top_genes |>
  gene_column(symbol, species = "human") |>
  bt_kable()
```
